_comment: Depth-1 composite (Addendum A), Option-A draw. N (the ordered_triple target) is drawn FIRST, uniform and in-band, so composite answers stay flat (PR #41 review fix for top3 0.388). A log expression with value e1+e2-e3 == N is then DERIVED, so the log still composes log_laws's oracle exactly. Knobs: N (target, within ordered_triple_constraint's [8,25] envelope), base + e3 (from log_laws); e1/e2 are derived (not drawable) to hit N within log_laws's [4,20] exponent envelope.
